title: About the Author
text: ABOUT THE AUTHOR TJ Klune is the New York Times and USA Today bestselling, Lambda Literary Award-winning author of The House in the Cerulean Sea , Under the Whispering Door , In the Lives of Puppets , the Green Creek series for adults, the Extraordinaries series for teens and more. Being queer himself, TJ believes it’s important – now more than ever – to have accurate, positive queer representation in stories. @tjklunebooks tjklunebooks.com
